servinfo.title: A/C Refrigerant Pressure Sensor Removal and Installation

s1.ptxt: Run engine at idle with A/C system on for 10 minutes.
Recover refrigerant from the A/C system using recovery and recycling equipment referring to “Recovery” in Operation Procedure for Refrigerant Charge .
Disconnect A/C refrigerant pressure sensor connector.
While holding liquid pipe (2) using backup wrench, remove A/C refrigerant pressure sensor (1).

servinfosub.title: Installation

ptxt.intxrefpoff: A/C Refrigerant Pressure Sensor and Its Circuit Inspection

servinfosub.ptxt: Reverse removal procedure, noting the following points.

item.ptxt: Apply compressor oil to new O-ring of A/C refrigerant pressure sensor.
Tighten A/C refrigerant pressure sensor to specified torque.
Evacuate and charge A/C system referring to “Evacuation” and “Charge” in Operation Procedure for Refrigerant Charge .
